input.prompt: Photorealistic underwater wildlife photograph of a Balaena mysticetus bowhead whale species swimming in the Arctic ocean. Plankton particles drift in the light shafts. National Geographic style wildlife photography, ultra sharp marine biology textbook accurate, peaceful majestic.
